# Required files for myHarness Harness layer (M1–M7)
# Sourced by .github/workflows/lint.yml (structure-check) and
# .github/workflows/scheduled.yml (daily-structure-audit).
#
# Rules:
#   - one file path per line, relative to repo root
#   - blank lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored
#   - any missing entry fails CI (lint.yml) and opens an issue (scheduled.yml)
#
# When adding a new file:
#   1. Add the path here (alphabetical within its section is nice but not required)
#   2. Commit alongside the file it lists
#   3. No workflow edit needed — both workflows read this file

# --- Root manifests ---
CLAUDE.md
README.md
AGENTS.md
CHANGELOG.md
.gitignore
.env.example
.mcp.json
package.json
.prettierrc.json
.tool-versions

# --- Harness config (.claude/) ---
.claude/settings.json
.claude/rules/engineering-practices.md

# --- Hooks ---
.claude/hooks/format.sh
.claude/hooks/stop-check.sh
.claude/hooks/pre-tool-use.sh
.claude/hooks/session-start.sh
.claude/hooks/subagent-stop.sh
.claude/hooks/user-prompt-submit.sh
.claude/hooks/tests/test_pre_tool_use.sh
.claude/hooks/tests/test_secret_detection.sh
.claude/hooks/tests/test_user_prompt_submit.sh

# --- Commands ---
.claude/commands/audit-practices.md
.claude/commands/audit-context.md
.claude/commands/commit.md
.claude/commands/onboard.md
.claude/commands/sync-docs.md

# --- Scripts ---

.claude/scripts/audit-log-summary.py

# --- CI ---
.github/workflows/lint.yml
.github/workflows/scheduled.yml
.github/workflows/plugin-validate.yml
.github/required-files.txt
